view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for in-person capacity and virtual attendance is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for in-person capacity and virtual attendance is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement of having in-person capacity alongside virtual attendance. The linked use case specifies '15 in-person seats + 10 virtual slots', which directly supports the requirement of 'In-person capacity + unlimited (or capped) virtual'. Additionally, the evidence from prior steps confirms that bookings for both in-person and virtual participants are being handled correctly, demonstrating that the system can accommodate the specified capacities.
